Session.demoNoSupabase: Demo: no Supabase — modules accessible without sign-in.

AthleteGate.noActiveCoach: If you are an approved coach, pick an athlete in Athletes. If the account is awaiting platform approval, data modules stay disabled until enabled.
AthleteGate.noActiveCoachApproved: Pick an athlete from the Athletes list to open their data (calendar, health, nutrition…).
AthleteGate.noActiveCoachPending: Your coach account is awaiting platform approval: data modules stay disabled until enabled.
AthleteGate.noActiveAthlete: Complete your profile in Profile to link your athlete, or wait for the account bootstrap to finish.

Pricing.paywallBannerBody: To use the Empathy platform you need an active plan or a complimentary access granted by an admin (testimonial / promo). Pick a plan below, or contact support if you believe you are entitled to free access.

Marketing.pitch: Empathy is a performance and physiology adaptation platform that drives adaptation through timing, stimuli, and nutrition. Measure change and bring you to real performance.
Marketing.card1Body: Sensors, imports, and lab data feed a canonical athlete state shared across modules.
Marketing.card2Body: Deterministic computation and a digital twin; AI interprets, orchestrates, and surfaces evidence.
Marketing.card3Body: Builder, calendar, nutrition, and health consume the same @empathy/contracts contracts.
Marketing.labBody: Connect your Garmin, Polar, or Wahoo device. Empathy reads every heartbeat, every watt, every meter and turns it into scientific analysis to improve your performance.
Marketing.howStep1Body: Sync your watch or bike computer. We support Garmin, Polar, Wahoo and FIT/TCX files.
Marketing.howStep2Body: Run, ride, ski, lift. Empathy collects every data point in the background without interrupting your flow.
Marketing.howStep3Body: Receive insights on physiology, biomechanics, nutrition and load. Adapt training based on real data.
Marketing.previewBody: Explore the preview dashboard to discover how Empathy turns raw data into actionable insights.

Access.errLinkInvalid: Sign-in not completed (link expired or invalid). Please try again with a new link.
Access.errSupabaseServer: Supabase is not configured on the server.
Access.hintCoach: After registration you land on the Athletes area: Empathy must approve your coach account before invites and roster work. You will receive access to the operational console once approved.
Access.hintAthlete: Personal athlete profile. If your account is already an approved coach on the platform, you always sign in as coach (DB role is not reset).

AccessForm.ariaSignIn: Sign in with email and password
AccessForm.ariaSignUp: Sign up with email and password
AccessForm.switchToSignUp: First time? Create an account with a password
AccessForm.switchToSignIn: I already have an account — back to sign in
AccessForm.signUpIntro: Create an account (same email you use for Empathy).
AccessForm.msgSupabaseMissingPublicKeys: Supabase is not configured: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL / ANON_KEY are missing.
AccessForm.msgProfileBootstrapFailed: Profile could not be updated. Try again or contact support.
AccessForm.msgSessionNotReady: Session not ready in this browser yet. Try signing in again.
AccessForm.msgEnterEmailForReset: Enter your email to receive the reset link.
AccessForm.msgPasswordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
AccessForm.msgConfirmEmailSent: Check your inbox to confirm the account (if email confirmation is enabled in Supabase).
AccessForm.msgResetSent: If the email is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password.
AccessForm.msgMagicLinkSent: Check your inbox: we sent you a sign-in link.
AccessForm.msgSessionInvalid: Invalid session or expired link. Request a new link from Access → Forgot password.
AccessForm.errSupabaseKeysClient: Invalid or missing Supabase keys in the client: check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in apps/web/.env.local (no extra spaces), then restart the dev server.
AccessForm.errSupabaseKeysShort: Invalid Supabase keys in the client: check NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_* in apps/web/.env.local and restart npm run dev.
AccessForm.errRedirectNotAllowed: Redirect not allowed by Supabase: in Dashboard → Authentication → URL add this exact origin (e.g. http://192.168.1.109:3020/** and …/auth/callback).
AccessForm.errRedirectNotAllowedMobile: Redirect not allowed: in Supabase → Authentication → URL add http://YOUR_IP:3020/** and the /auth/callback callback (same scheme/host/port you use on the phone).
AccessForm.errInvalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. If you never set a password (legacy email-link sign-in), create one via “Forgot password?”.
AccessForm.errEmailNotConfirmed: You still need to confirm your email (Supabase link). On a test project you can disable "Confirm email" in Authentication → Providers → Email.
AccessForm.errAlreadyRegistered: This email already has an account (e.g. via magic link). You do not need "Sign up": go back to Sign in, or use "Forgot password?" to set a password.

AccessPlan.title: Activate your free trial
AccessPlan.subtitle: To use Empathy as an athlete you need a subscription. Pick your plan or start with the free trial — no card required. For paid plans, complete your billing details below first.
AccessPlan.requiredAlert: To use Training, VIRYA, integrations, and your profile you need to activate the trial with a card (or an admin-granted access).
AccessPlan.welcomeBody: Your account is active and your free trial has started successfully. You can now enter the platform and start using Empathy.
AccessPlan.welcomeSyncRetry: Please wait a few seconds while we confirm your payment with Stripe.
AccessPlan.welcomeSyncSlow: Confirmation is taking longer than usual. Stay on this page — it will update automatically.

Checkout.billingSuccess: Done. You can enter the app from Access or the dashboard.
Checkout.signupBillingSuccess: Welcome to Empathy — registration and trial activation complete.
Checkout.billingCancel: Payment not completed. You can try again whenever you want.
Checkout.payNotReady: You can still pick a plan and a coach. The payment button activates when the environment is configured for subscriptions.
Checkout.priceNotConnected: Price not connected in this environment.
Checkout.coachSub: Add a support tier on top of the chosen plan.
Checkout.coachPriceNotConnected: Add-on not connected in this environment.
Checkout.trialNotEligible: Trial not active in this environment or plan not eligible.
Checkout.trialNotConfigured: Free trial is not active in this environment.
Checkout.trialSummary: The whole platform, free: the trial starts on the Silver plan and you pay nothing until it ends.
Checkout.trialF1: Full access to the core modules
Checkout.trialF2: Card required, zero charges during the trial
Checkout.billingEmailNote: Billing and receipts to {email} — admins can extend access with dedicated grants.
Checkout.haveAccount: I already have an account — Access
Checkout.signupTrialCardHint: Stripe requires a payment method to start the trial; billing begins only after the trial period ends.
Checkout.errPayNotReady: Online subscriptions are not yet enabled in this environment. Ask the team to finish configuration, or use Access if you already have an account.

SettingsLocale.title: Interface language
SettingsLocale.subtitle: Navigation and panel labels only (chrome). Engines, API contracts, and technical names stay unchanged.
SettingsLocale.label: Language

Admin.deniedBody: This console is for platform administrators only. Contact support if you need operational access.
Admin.title: Administration console
Admin.intro: Coach onboarding, user directory, and complimentary access. Signed in as:
Admin.directoryHint: Roles, coaches, report, directory, and grants. Jump to:
Admin.coachesSub: Approve, hold, or suspend. Pending requests are listed first ({count}).
Admin.coachNoteBody: only accounts registered as coach appear here. Users still on an athlete account are not listed: they must sign out and sign in via /access choosing “Coach”.
Admin.emptyCoaches: No coaches in the list. If you expected someone, make sure they use a coach account (sign in with Coach), not only the Athletes page while logged in as an athlete.
Admin.comingBody: Next: admin audit log and Stripe catalog management from console (prices/coupons). Server paywall (`EMPATHY_PAYWALL_ENFORCED`) stays a separate rollout.

AdminRolePanel.title: User role & coach approval
AdminRolePanel.subtitle: Search by email, review status, and set athlete or coach (pending / approved / suspended).
AdminRolePanel.pendingMore: …and {count} more in the full list below.
AdminRolePanel.rosterLinked: Roster as coach: {count} athletes linked in DB.
AdminRolePanel.rosterNeedsActivation: This account has roster athletes but cannot open the coach console: use «Approve coach» (sets coach role + active). Without that, login shows an empty roster.

AdminReport.title: Platform report
AdminReport.subtitle: KPIs, coaches with athlete rosters, module adoption (reality-data proxy), and low-engagement athletes.
AdminReport.rollupsMissing: Activity rollups unavailable: apply migrations 058 and 059 on Supabase.
AdminReport.modulesHeading: Module adoption (athletes with at least one signal)
AdminReport.modulesFootnote: Training = workouts/import; Nutrition = food diary; Health = panels/staging; Integrations = Garmin/device/sync; Bioenergetics = time-series samples (055) or interpretation staging.
AdminReport.rosterMismatchHint: Links exist in coach_athletes but the account has no approved coach role — explains «0 coaches» with roster links > 0. Fix in «User role» above.
AdminReport.athletesTruncated: Showing first {count} athletes; use the directory for paginated detail.

AdminDirectory.title: Registered users
AdminDirectory.subtitle: Supabase Auth list · page {page} · {perPage} per page
AdminDirectory.fullListNote: Paginate with Next/Previous. CSV is this page only. Apply migrations 058 + 059 on Supabase for activity + ingest rollups (read-only RPC for admin stats).
AdminDirectory.thTrainingHint: Executed count · last / Planned count · last
AdminDirectory.thIngestHint: G = Garmin pull jobs · D = device sync exports · B = Garmin activity blobs · S = interpretation staging runs · I = training file imports. ● = Garmin OAuth linked for athlete.
AdminDirectory.detailNoAthlete: No athlete profile linked — user has not completed app profile bootstrap.
AdminDirectory.grantFromDetail: Open grants flow for this email
AdminDirectory.confirmPrivate: Revert this user to a private athlete account? Coach–athlete links in the database are not removed automatically.

AdminGrants.title: Complimentary access (testimonial / promo / comp)
AdminGrants.intro: Search by email and grant time-limited free access. Approved coaches already have the coach console (roster management), but to use the product as an athlete on their own profile they still need an active plan or a grant below.

info.grantCreatedWithNotice: Grant created — in-app notice sent to the user.

ViryaAerobicNote.note: Every Virya plan is single-discipline: for multiple sports, create separate plans (same guided flow). The active discipline is the one chosen at step 2; Calendar generation uses only that one.

BuilderDayAdaptationPanel.readingScore: Reading twin score and planned session…
BuilderDayAdaptationPanel.scoreSummary: Score {scorePct}% ({trafficLight}) · session target ~{loadScalePct}% of the VIRYA plan.
BuilderDayAdaptationPanel.noSessionPlanned: No session planned for this day: generate from scratch with the current score.
BuilderDayAdaptationPanel.openWithCalendarDate: Open with a calendar date to guide duration and TSS.

BuilderDetailsEngineAccordion.accordionSubtitle: Generative context, assets and calendar window KPIs
BuilderDetailsEngineAccordion.supportAuditNote: Knowledge library and external assets are for support and audit: the session engine stays deterministic; no redirect or block if data is missing (local in-module fallback).
BuilderDetailsEngineAccordion.selectAthletePrompt: Select an active athlete to load traces and nutrition context.
BuilderDetailsEngineAccordion.readOnlyNutritionApi: Read-only nutrition API — useful to align mental fueling to the chosen day.

BuilderEngineGenerateSection.introStrength: The engine proposes the structure (exercise names), then the <cat>card on the EMPATHY catalog</cat> materializes with sets, reps, recoveries and images. Discipline: <disc>{sport}</disc>.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.introTechnical: Focus on technique, tactics, patterns and modules: the pure-aerobic part stays in A · Aerobic. The builder estimates a <tss>TSS</tss> to compare with RPE / internal load. Discipline: <disc>{sport}</disc>.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.introLifestyle: Presets for mobility, recovery, movement quality and light aerobic work (mind-body). Discipline: <disc>{sport}</disc>.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.introAerobic: Aerobic macro: compact inputs. Output: blocks + exercises from the library, calibrated on the athlete's physiological profile and digital twin when available.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.equipmentHint: Weights, bodyweight, cables, bands, machines. No chip = no strict filter.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.executionStyleLabel: Execution style in the generated card
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.modularStructureHint: Align work phase, game context and athletic quality: the engine enriches cue and track (like V1 goals: offensive/defensive phase, patterns, technical module).
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.dailyAdaptationBody: The VIRYA plan stays unchanged; this session is scaled by recovery, twin and bioenergetics.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.generatedCardHint: Names proposed and matched to the EMPATHY catalog. Refine sets and loads in the editor below.
BuilderEngineGenerateSection.wahooIneligibleTitle: Requires an endurance session with blocks, valid FTP/HR and a connected Wahoo account (Profile).

BuilderSportMacroSectorPicker.sportBySectorDescription: First choose macro and discipline; the engine domain (endurance / gym / hyrox / crossfit / team_sport / combat / mind_body) feeds engine generation and the manual builder below.

BuilderUpcomingPlannedSection.title: Upcoming planned
BuilderUpcomingPlannedSection.subtitle: Sorted by date, from the API window.
BuilderUpcomingPlannedSection.emptyTitle: No future sessions in the window
BuilderUpcomingPlannedSection.emptyBody: Plan from the builder above or wait for the calendar refresh: here you'll see upcoming sessions as colored cards.

BuilderViryaEntryBanner.note: Path from VIRYA: here you materialize the single session with the builder engine. The calendar updates only after explicit save.

ViryaAnnualLoadProjectionCard.dynamicLoopNote: Annual plan ready for the dynamic loop: Calendar → Analyzer → Adaptation.

ViryaApprovedDecisionsCard.title: Approved decisions · VIRYA input
ViryaApprovedDecisionsCard.subtitle: Patches validated by the Reasoning Dashboard: they influence the retune, but the session stays materialized by the Builder.
ViryaApprovedDecisionsCard.autoAdaptDescription: If recovery is inefficient, VIRYA automatically adapts the program according to the coach percentage. The calendar is written only when you save.

ViryaCalendarPlansCard.title: VIRYA Plans on Calendar
ViryaCalendarPlansCard.subtitle: Sessions tagged [VIRYA:…] for the active athlete — delete an entire plan before republishing
ViryaCalendarPlansCard.noPlans: No VIRYA plan in Calendar for this athlete.
ViryaCalendarPlansCard.confirmDelete: Delete all {count} sessions of the plan «{planName}» ({dateMin} → {dateMax})?

ViryaContextKpiCard.title: Context · KPI
ViryaContextKpiCard.subtitle: Goal, readiness, adaptation loop (from athlete memory)

ViryaEventsCard.title: Events and intermediate dates
ViryaEventsCard.subtitle: Races, tests, milestones — they anchor taper and peak

ViryaHeroHeader.intro: Five-step path — same session engine as the builder. Weekly focal goals (stimuli) are at step 5, column «Goals (multiple)». Batch deploy to Calendar from there when you're ready.
ViryaHeroHeader.calendarTagSuffix: — use it to tell Gym, Running, etc. apart in the plan list below.

ViryaMacroFamilyStep.cardSubtitle: Aerobic, Gym, Technical-tactical or Lifestyle — one alone guides the annual structure

ViryaMacroPeriodsCard.title: Preparation macro-periods
ViryaMacroPeriodsCard.subtitle: Base, build, taper, peak — four phases over the duration chosen in step 3
ViryaMacroPeriodsCard.windowDescription: The template splits the window <mono>{start}</mono> → <mono>{end}</mono> into four coherent blocks. You can fine-tune dates and TSS in the next step (phase table and weekly grid).
ViryaMacroPeriodsCard.generateClassicPhases: Generate classic phases (base · build · taper · peak)
ViryaMacroPeriodsCard.overwriteWarning: Overwrites the current phase list and clears weekly customizations until you reset them in step 5.

ViryaMasterPlanCard.title: Annual master plan (week/day navigator)
ViryaMasterPlanCard.hint: Open a specific week in Calendar and edit/replace the single session directly from the day.

ViryaMicrocyclePreviewCard.cardSubtitle: Day pattern, Q/V polarization and instructions that generateBuilderSession will receive (first week of phase 1)
ViryaMicrocyclePreviewCard.emptyState: Add at least one phase to see the week preview.

ViryaOperationalModulationCard.title: Operational modulation
ViryaOperationalModulationCard.subtitle: Scaled load, recovery, bio signals and plan vs actual

ViryaPlanPeriodStep.cardSubtitle: Seasonal interval; in the next step key goal, events and macro-phases
ViryaPlanPeriodStep.realignNote: . Presets, dates or «Continue» instantly realign phases and the weekly grid (base · build · taper · peak).

ViryaSaveToCalendarCard.title: Save to Calendar
ViryaSaveToCalendarCard.subtitle: Bulk-save the plan's sessions to the Calendar
ViryaSaveToCalendarCard.planLine: Plan «{name}» · tag {tag}. Configuring May–Jun in VIRYA does not write to the Calendar: this button is required. After success, open Calendar on the indicated dates (e.g. May–June).
ViryaSaveToCalendarCard.replaceLabel: Replace VIRYA sessions already saved in the same date range as the plan (marker [VIRYA:…] in the notes)

ViryaSaveWeekToLibraryCard.title: Save week to library
ViryaSaveWeekToLibraryCard.subtitle: Export VIRYA → N coach templates (Builder contract, same materialization as the Calendar)
ViryaSaveWeekToLibraryCard.intro: Export a sample week as reusable templates in the coach library — without writing to the Calendar. Same materialization pipeline as the Calendar batch.

ViryaSeasonObjectiveStep.cardSubtitle: The reason for the season — drives hints, plan copy and calendar notes
ViryaSeasonObjectiveStep.objectivePlaceholder: E.g. double peak on races X/Y, threshold and VO2, lactate management for 40k…

ViryaSportDisciplineStep.cardSubtitle: Choose the operational discipline consistent with the macro

ViryaStrengthConfigBlock.volumeRule: Volume rule: Unload 50-99% · Stable 100% · Load 101-180%. Configure up to {slots} days; during Calendar generation the first {sessions} days of the table are used.
ViryaStrengthConfigBlock.dayBeyondSessionsTitle: Day beyond the sessions/week — not used in generation until you increase the training days

ViryaWeeklyProgramTable.cardSubtitle: {weeks} weeks (step 3 window: {window}) · {load}, sessions, hours and focus — used in Calendar
ViryaWeeklyProgramTable.footerNote: Initial values from the phases; changes here take priority over generation. Weekly hours (aerobic macro) distribute the average duration per session.

CalendarDaySessionDetail.routeStartPointOnly: start point only (Garmin Activity Details not yet received)
CalendarDaySessionDetail.routeSingleGpsPoint: single GPS point — no interpolated track
CalendarDaySessionDetail.noHighResSeries: No high-resolution time series available for this session (the device summary does not expose them; for dense curves import the FIT/TCX/GPX file).
CalendarDaySessionDetail.subtitle: {count, plural, one {# executed session} other {# executed sessions}} · {date}
CalendarDaySessionDetail.emptyState: No executed session recorded for this day. Import a file (FIT/TCX/GPX) or wait for the sync from Garmin/Strava/Wahoo.

CalendarDayWellnessDetail.subtitle: Sleep · recovery · day · {date}
CalendarDayWellnessDetail.noData: No day data available (connect Garmin/Whoop or upload a Health panel with sample_date aligned to {date}).

Pro2GymSchedaBlockList.noGymProgram: No gym program in the contract (missing gymRx). Regenerate from the Builder or republish the VIRYA gym plan.
Pro2GymSchedaBlockList.noCatalogLink: Gym session with no catalog link (images unavailable). Republish from VIRYA or regenerate in the Builder.

TechnicalPlaybookSchemaFrame.generativeRasterNote: Generative raster: coming soon (today SVG field V1)

TrainingViryaActivePlanStrip.noPlanOnCalendar: No VIRYA plan on Calendar — <link>create from VIRYA</link>
TrainingViryaActivePlanStrip.staleWarning: The preferred VIRYA plan no longer has sessions in the calendar (e.g. replaced by Builder). Choose another plan or republish from VIRYA.
